<!-- What concrete problem does this pull request solve? -->

## Related issue

<!-- Use `Closes #123` when this PR should close an issue. -->

## Change type

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Agent compatibility or installation fix
- [ ] Behavior or policy change
- [ ] Configuration or CLI change
- [ ] Verification or test improvement
- [ ] Documentation only
- [ ] Maintenance or release tooling

## Summary of changes

<!-- List the smallest meaningful set of changes. -->

## Behavior impact

<!-- Describe any change to the canonical policy, modes, profiles, defaults, or user-visible output. Write `None` when behavior is unchanged. -->

## Agent compatibility

<!-- Identify affected agents and installation/discovery contracts. Write `None` when no agent integration is affected. -->

## Evidence

<!-- Include before/after examples, exact commands, test output, screenshots, or real-agent observations. Remove secrets and private information. -->

## Validation

- [ ] `npm ci`
- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] `npm run verify:install`
- [ ] `npm run pack:check`
- [ ] Relevant real-agent verification completed or explicitly documented as unavailable

## Safety and scope

- [ ] The change preserves system and developer instruction precedence.
- [ ] The change respects explicit user output contracts and permission boundaries.
- [ ] The change does not claim completion without verification.
- [ ] Behavior changes include deterministic tests or evaluation coverage.
- [ ] Agent-specific code does not duplicate or drift from the canonical skill policy.

<!-- Highlight risky areas, intentional tradeoffs, or follow-up work. -->
